title: Verify existing implementation of rate limit check
description: The checkRateLimit function and tests already exist in src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.ts and src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.test.ts. All 8 tests pass. The implementation uses a sliding window algorithm with in-memory Map, tracking request timestamps per key and returning { allowed: boolean; retryAfter?: number }.
existing_patterns: src/utils/*.ts — single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts files
Sliding window rate limiting with in-memory Map in src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.ts
